response_options.label: COMPLY
response_options.likely_outcome: Positive — most vessels respond well to openness.

response_options.label: EVASIVE
response_options.description: Claim to be a civilian transport.
response_options.likely_outcome: Risky — works if they don't scan you.

response_options.label: ASSERTIVE
response_options.description: Identify as a warship and demand they stand down.

sig_1.speaker: them
sig_1.text: This is the transport vessel Meridian. Cargo run to sector 7.

sig_7.speaker: them
sig_7.text: EMERGENCY — vessel in distress at (17026, 38886). Requesting immediate assistance.

sig_7.speaker: them
sig_7.text: Sending coordinates now. We don't have much time.

sig_10.speaker: them

sig_17.speaker: them

sig_20.speaker: them
sig_20.text: EMERGENCY — vessel in distress at (87974, 95000). Requesting immediate assistance.

sig_23.speaker: them
sig_23.text: This is the transport vessel Meridian. Cargo run to sector 7.

sig_23.speaker: them
sig_23.text: Big words. Let's see if your guns match.

sig_28.speaker: them
sig_28.text: EMERGENCY — vessel in distress at (9547, 76815). Requesting immediate assistance.

sig_28.speaker: them
sig_28.text: Copy — help is on the way? We're venting atmosphere!

missions.title: Patrol Sector
missions.briefing: Command requests a patrol sweep of the area. Recent hostile activity reported.

missions.title: Rescue Distress Beacon
missions.briefing: Distress Beacon is under attack at coordinates 17026, 38886. Requesting immediate assistance.

objectives.description: Dock with Distress Beacon for medical transfer

rewards.description: Faction standing +15, 50 credits, 2 replacement crew, sector chart data

decline_consequences.description: Distress Beacon destroyed.  Nearby factions note our non-response.

failure_consequences.description: Arrived too late. Slight standing loss (they tried).
